message:
fix(pi-agent): resolve 3 Codex-to-Pi conversion failures (#9)

1. Message count mismatch: tool-result-only Codex events (empty content,
   no tool_calls, but with tool_results) were silently dropped by the Pi
   writer. Now these messages get synthesized content from tool results
   so they survive the Pi reader's empty-content filter on read-back.

2. Pi TypeError crash: the fallback usage object was missing cacheRead,
   cacheWrite, totalTokens, and the nested cost object that Pi's
   footer.js requires. Now all fields are present, and existing partial
   usage objects get backfilled with missing keys.

3. Resume hint: changed from the incorrect "pi-agent --resume <id>" to
   "pi --session <full-path-to-session.jsonl>" matching the actual CLI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
